buttons.primary: bg-[#4338CA] hover:bg-[#3730A3] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm hover:shadow
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FF5A5F] hover:bg-[#E0484D] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm hover:shadow
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 hover:border-[#4338CA] text-slate-700 hover:text-[#4338CA] bg-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_2px_10px_-3px_rgba(6,81,237,0.1)] hover:border-[#4338CA] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all cursor-pointer duration-300

inputs.default: w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4338CA]/20 focus:border-[#4338CA] outline-none transition-all text-slate-900 bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-slate-50

components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-slate-200/80 saturate-150

images.description: 3D abstract composition of floating calendar pages and clock shapes in vivid coral orange and cobalt blue. MUST use for the split-screen image in the Login/Register flow.
Abstract vibrant geometric wave pattern. MUST use as the top banner background in the Provider Dashboard or Provider Public Profile.
Modern office space with orange wall and blue carpet. Use for fallback background or About/Contact sections if needed.

animation_guidelines.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a subtle transition (duration-200 ease-in-out).
animation_guidelines.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight upward translation for main content blocks.
animation_guidelines.list_items: Staggered fade-in for service catalog and time slots.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text on backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4338CA]/20 focus:border-[#4338CA] focus:outline-none.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in React (.js files, NOT .tsx) using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI components.
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts in index.html and apply them to Tailwind config.
Implement Authentication (Login/Register) as split-screens, placing the 'login_hero_3d' image on the non-form side. Allow switching between Customer and Provider roles.
Provider Dashboard: Use 'provider_banner' image as a rich header graphic. Include stats (today's appointments, revenue) and a schedule manager.
Customer Dashboard: Display upcoming appointments prominently. Include a service catalog grid (bento-style).
Booking Flow: Use Shadcn Calendar and customized selects for picking time slots.
Ensure heavily customized Shadcn components (Inputs, Cards, Buttons) to match the vivid, high-contrast, rounded-2xl styling.
Apply `data-testid` to all actionable elements and important UI nodes to support automated testing.
